text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey has brought me along to a store
in the mall.
choice_data_list: What did you want to buy here?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Sooo, I need something to keep my fan letters
in. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I've been getting letters from all kinds of people
lately, and those letters don't fit in the box in my
room anymore.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Feng shui actually says it's better to get rid of
letters after a certain amount of time. But there
are some exceptions.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If you have letters that make you feel happy, or if
they're from people who mean a lot to you, it's
okay to keep them as long as you store them
somewhere that gets a lot of sunlight.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
I want to cherish all the letters my fans have sent
me. ♪

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
One of them said, "I don't really understand feng
shui, but your running made me feel so much
better."

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
And another letter was from a fan who talked
about how I inspired her to start learning about
feng shui!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hearing what my fans have to say gives me so
much strength!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ The color, the shape, and the breathability of the material are all perfect! I'll put my fan letters in this as soon as I get back to my room!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It's pretty big, but once this basket's full, I'm
going to have to get an even bigger one.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh! But what will I do if I get so many fan letters
that my whole room fills up?!
choice_data_list: For you, Rickey, that might happen pretty soon.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Oh! My dad might have some good ideas! Maybe
I'll ask him the next time we talk.

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Well... I'll have to figure something out, but if I
end up with that many people supporting me, it's
going to be one happy day!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like imagining a bright future has boosted
Copano Rickey's motivation even higher.
